items.title: Chat history as an ordered list
items.scenario: A chatbot keeps the conversation in messages = [{role, content}, ...] and appends each new turn.
items.explanation: Order matters (the model reads turns top-to-bottom), and appends to the end are amortized O(1).

items.title: RAG: retrieved chunks
items.scenario: A retriever returns the top-k matching document chunks as a list, in score order.
items.explanation: You iterate the list to assemble context; order encodes ranking and is preserved by the list.

items.title: Streaming tokens
items.scenario: Tokens stream in one-by-one and are collected into a tokens list, then joined into a string.
items.explanation: Appending each token is fast; building the string at the end with ''.join() avoids quadratic concatenation.

items.title: Numeric vectors
items.scenario: An embedding is a fixed-length list of floats compared to other vectors at scale.
items.explanation: Use a NumPy/Torch array — packed memory and vectorized math make distance computations orders of magnitude faster than a Python list.
